info.name: HubSpot CRM Engagement Calls API
info.description:
The HubSpot CRM Engagement Calls API enables you to manage call engagements within your HubSpot CRM.

Use this API to:
- Create, read, update, and delete call records
- Perform batch operations on multiple calls
- Search for calls using filters and queries
- Associate calls with contacts, companies, deals, and other CRM objects
- Manage call properties and track call history
- Handle GDPR-compliant data purging

Call engagements represent phone calls logged in your CRM and can include details like duration, outcome, notes, and recordings.


Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

Updates an existing call engagement with new property values.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the call

request.description:
Archives (soft deletes) a call engagement by moving it to the recycling bin.
Archived calls can be restored within 90 days.

response.name: Successfully archived the call (no content returned)

item.name: Hubspot Create a Batch of Calls

request.description:
Creates multiple call engagements in a single request.
Each call can have its own properties and associations.
Maximum of 100 calls per batch request.

response.name: Successfully created the batch of calls

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Multi-status response (some operations succeeded, some failed)

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

request.description:
Retrieves multiple call engagements by their IDs or a unique property value.
Maximum of 100 calls per batch request.

item.name: Hubspot Update a Batch of Calls

request.description:
Updates multiple call engagements in a single request.
Each call update must include the call ID and the properties to update.
Maximum of 100 calls per batch request.

response.name: Successfully updated the batch of calls

item.name: Hubspot Archive a Batch of Calls

request.description:
Archives (soft deletes) multiple call engagements in a single request.
Maximum of 100 calls per batch request.

response.name: Successfully archived the batch of calls (no content returned)

request.description:
Searches for call engagements using filters, property values, and full-text search.
Supports complex filter groups with AND/OR logic.

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Hubspot Permanently Delete a Call for Gdpr Compliance

request.description:
Permanently deletes a call engagement for GDPR compliance.
This action cannot be undone. Use this endpoint when you need to comply with a data subject's right to erasure request.

response.name: Successfully deleted the call (no content returned)
